user.title: Electrolux AC
user.description: Enter the API key and JWT tokens from the Electrolux developer portal (developer.electrolux.one).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Electrolux AC
reauth_confirm.description: Your tokens expired. Paste fresh tokens from the developer portal.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your API key and tokens.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Electrolux API.

abort.already_configured: This Electrolux account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The tokens belong to a different Electrolux account.
